subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God! Thy steadfastness in the Cause of God hath been recorded in the Tablets and inscribed by the Most Exalted Pen. Render thou thanksgiving [3.5s]... ...Steadfastness in the Cause is mentioned in the Tablets and set forth by the Pen of the Ancient of Days. Render thanks to the Beloved of the world
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله استقامتت بر امرالله در الواح مذکور و از قلم قدم مسطور حمد کن
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power of prayer, @role and station of women, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
